Alarm management implementation and header files for creation, configuration, scheduling, and pin management.


## Files
- **[alarm.c](alarm.c.md)**: Implementation of alarm management in the Pebble firmware, including creation, configuration, scheduling, and snoozing of alarms.
- **[alarm.h](alarm.h.md)**: Header file for managing alarm functionalities, including creation, configuration, and persistence across resets.
- **[alarm_pin.c](alarm_pin.c.md)**: Functions for adding and removing alarm pins with attributes and actions in the timeline.
- **[alarm_pin.h](alarm_pin.h.md)**: Functions to add and remove alarms using time, ID, type, kind, and UUID.
